headline: West Expands Dublin Facility to Support High-Volume Injectable Therapies, Including Diabetes and Obesity
summary: West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc. (NYSE: WST), a global leader in innovative solutions for injectable drug administration, announced today the opening of its new building at its current site in Damastown, Dublin. The 165,000 square foot expansion significantly enhances West's contract services and is designed to meet growing global demands of its customers' high-volume treatments, including diabetes and obesity.

content.title: West Expands Dublin Facility to Support High-Volume Injectable Therapies, Including Diabetes and Obesity
content.summary: West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc. (NYSE: WST), a global leader in innovative solutions for injectable drug administration, announced today the opening of its new building at its current site in Damastown, Dublin. The 165,000 square foot expansion significantly enhances West's contract services and is designed to meet growing global demands of its customers' high-volume treatments, including diabetes and obesity.

thumbnail.caption: West Pharmaceutical Services today opened its new building at its Damastown, Dublin site. The 165,000 square foot expansion significantly enhances West’s contract services and is designed to meet growing global demands of its customers’ high-volume treatments, including diabetes and obesity. Pictured at the opening were: Eric Green, Chief Executive Officer, West; Aileen Ruff-Patry, President, Contract Manufacturing, West; Minister for Public Expenditure, Infrastructure, Public Service Reform and Digitalization, Jack Chambers; Michael Lohan, Chief Executive Officer, IDA Ireland

headline: Here's What to Expect From West Pharmaceutical's Next Earnings Report
summary: West Pharmaceutical is set to announce its first-quarter earnings soon, and Wall Street expects the company’s EPS to increase by double digits.

content.title: Here's What to Expect From West Pharmaceutical's Next Earnings Report
